programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Fred Grandy plays a wealthy businessman whose wife was strangled in a motel room where she had recently trysted with her lover The solution to the crime gives Det La Guardia Sidney Clute a totally unexpected chance to shine when he notices that a blackmailer photographing the couple in flagrante also photographed the hotel rooms TV set running a soap opera La Guardia secretly and faithfully watches - and featuring a character which was supposedly off the show at the time the photo was taken

programme.title: Starsky 310
programme.desc: Starsky 310

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When Eddie a chronically drunk friend of Doms spouts off about UFO-type lights hes been seeing near his desert trailer everyone writes him off as a crackpot until one night while taking Eddie home Dom spots them too He and String investigate and discover a military compound nearby headed by a renegade general who is planning a preemptive nuclear strike against the Soviet Union Unfortunately while escaping Dom is shot and its up to Eddie to ride shotgun aboard Airwolf with String even though he doesnt believe he can do what may be asked of him

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A reporter trails a violent cult of devil worshipers calling people back from the dead

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa refuses to join the Grange co-op so he strikes out on his own to make his fortune in the egg business

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa inherits some antique furniture from his recently deceased 94-year-old Uncle Willie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Rifleman 508
programme.desc: Rifleman 508

programme.title: Rifleman 519
programme.desc: Rifleman 519

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E33 Buffalo Hunter
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E33 Buffalo Hunter

programme.title: Gunsmoke S06E09 The Badge
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S06E09 The Badge

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman with whom Kimble was dining becomes angry when he tells her he must leave town She disappears and is found roughed up but alive Kimble knows she must tell police he did not abduct her in order to save him from being arrested

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A murderer who meets his victims through a dating service stalks Natalie and she learns of Nicks secret past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan suspects a news anchor of murder but the man has a solid alibi that makes it nearly impossible to prove he is the culprit

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: To join a secret club known as the Imperial Demons Little Luke must go into an abandoned haunted house at night and succeed in taking a light all the way to the top floor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to marry off a friend in danger of being deported

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max becomes a drunken jobless bum so that KAOS will recruit him

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Buildings are being blown up in Washington by paintings that include explosives

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Cindy and Stacks go undercover at a gymnasium linked to a series of baffling burglaries most recently one that netted a 400000 painting entrusted to Bear Enterprises Detective Finger a cross between Columbo and Clouseau joins BJ in cracking the case

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalters sister

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Under the impression that Parker is an Ace Gunner Binghamton wagers one of his most prized possessions that Parker can out-shoot an arrogant Captains best gunner

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A lovely French girl agrees to help the guys out in a plan to raise expense money for the birth of Christys child

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Hart 218
programme.desc: Hart 218

programme.title: Newhart - 711
programme.desc: Newhart - 711

programme.title: Newhart - 706
programme.desc: Newhart - 706

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: MacGillis father comes to visit but things are uneasy and it seems his father is always disappointed and putting him down Polly is asked to run for mayor

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is jealous of the Skipper when he saves Mary Ann from drowning But he may get his chance to be a hero yet when a headhunter takes the other castaways prisoner

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan witness a murder committed by a stark staring mad woman called Francesca Ryan does some investigating and becomes more and more convinced that Francesca is a very real vampire who has chosen Mitch as her next victim

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonias grasp sending them on a violent high speed chase Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit the team must decide whether theyre willing to risk it all

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous comical and memorable repos of the series And get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Hercules 209
programme.desc: Hercules 209

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor and Daan travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A revolutionary med cell is created that could save countless lives But fearing that the Morthrens could turn it into something deadly the Blackwood team tries to get their hands on it first Meanwhile Malzor desperately tries to acquire it to heal a dying Mana his second-in-command

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Sheriff Andrews allows Dr Arcane to hunt an employee for sport To teach Andrews a lesson Alec traps him a fantasy of the old west populated by familiar faces forcing him to duel the evil Renegade Jake in a fight to the death

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: What happens when the swamp itself is no longer an ally to Swamp Thing The answers lay with a man called Mephisto

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A student at a prestigious boys school under pressure by his father to get into Harvard kills a professor when he will not change the failing grade he was going to give him in one class

programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A dying prisoner asks his son to kill the two people whose testimony caused his death a Stockton banker named Clark and Victoria Barkley After Clark is murdered Jarrod unaware that Victoria is the next target agrees to act as the sons lawyer when he is put on trial for murder

programme.desc: When Cheyenne is hired as foreman at a ranch in a range war he doesnt realize part of his job is to marry the boss daughter She turns down all the men her father introduces her to as she loves a Mexican but he hates Mexicans

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is after a scepter from the underground city of Rajim Matt and the team pursue them into the city only to have the tables turned and become prisoners of the citys inhabitants

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Link and Zelda help the N team in building a mechanical dragon the purpose of which is to help them sneak in Dragons Den and put a stop to Dragonlords evil plan of hatching a deadly golden dragon

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Pit is heading for disappointment from his TV hero after he decides to aid him versus Mother Brain

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick Matt and AJ are kidnapped at the heart of Gobotron but when they escape the Renegades they fall into the hands of Wrecks the leader of a gang of thieves who enters Matt in a bizarre form of gladiatorial combat

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 turns evil when hes tricked into changing into a fake power suit but Cy-Kills plot backfires when hes deposed by the newly nasty Guardian
